title: Social Class of University Students 2009-2010
description: The data consist of 42 narratives written by university students on their self-perceived social class, parents' social class, the significance of social class in the university environment, and experiences of university studies. The writing invitation was sent to the e-mail lists of student organisations for students studying social research, social work, social policy, social psychology or similar subjects in Finnish universities.
